name: Felipe Calderón Hinojosa
role: President of Mexico (2006–2012) — Initiated the militarized war on drugs
quote: We cannot wait for criminals to act first. The State must take the initiative against organized crime.

name: Margarita Zavala
role: First Lady of Mexico (2006–2012) — PAN politician, Calderón's political partner
quote: The families of Mexico want to live in peace. That is what we are fighting for.

name: Genaro García Luna
role: Secretary of Public Security (2006–2012) — Later convicted in US for Sinaloa Cartel bribery
quote: We will dismantle these criminal organizations piece by piece, leader by leader.

name: Gen. Guillermo Galván Galván
role: Secretary of National Defense / SEDENA (2006–2012) — Led the military deployment against cartels
quote: The Mexican Army will not lower its arms until the drug traffickers are defeated.

name: Adm. Francisco Saynez Mendoza
role: Secretary of the Navy / SEMAR (2006–2012) — Led key marine operations including Arturo Beltrán Leyva raid
quote: The Navy of Mexico acts with precision and legal authority to restore security to the Mexican people.

name: José Francisco Blake Mora
role: Interior Secretary (Gobernación) 2010–2011 — Killed in helicopter crash November 2011
quote: The security of Mexicans is the indispensable condition for development and democracy.

name: Joaquín 'El Chapo' Guzmán
role: Sinaloa Cartel leader — Mexico's most wanted drug lord during the entire Calderón era
quote: If there was no demand [in the US], there would be no supply. We are the farmers. We are the laborers.

name: Arturo Beltrán Leyva
role: BLO leader 'El Jefe de Jefes' — Founded rival cartel after Sinaloa split; killed December 2009
quote: I am the boss of bosses. No one gives me orders.

name: Heriberto 'El Lazca' Lazcano
role: Los Zetas co-founder and leader — Ex-elite soldier, killed by marines October 2012
quote: The Zetas are the elite of the elite. We answer to no one.

name: Osiel Cárdenas Guillén
role: Gulf Cartel boss — Founded Los Zetas as his armed wing; extradited to US in January 2007
quote: I have friends everywhere — in the army, in the police, in the government.

name: Ignacio 'Nacho' Coronel
role: Sinaloa Cartel 'Crystal King' — Methamphetamine lord; killed by army July 2010
quote: Crystal methamphetamine is the future. Cocaine is expensive. This is cheap and powerful.

name: Antonio 'Tony Tormenta' Cárdenas Guillén
role: Gulf Cartel chief — Killed in massive Matamoros battle with marines, November 2010
quote: Tamaulipas belongs to the Gulf Cartel. Anyone who enters without permission will answer to us.

name: Andrés Manuel López Obrador (AMLO)
role: PRD presidential candidate 2006 — Alleged election fraud, declared himself 'legitimate president'
quote: There was fraud. The people did not choose Calderón. I do not recognize this government.

name: Javier Sicilia
role: Poet and peace activist — Founded Movement for Peace with Justice and Dignity after his son's murder
quote: We say enough! We do not want more deaths. This war must stop. Poetry no longer exists in me.

name: Josefina Vázquez Mota
role: PAN presidential candidate 2012 — Calderón's party successor, lost to PRI's Peña Nieto
quote: Mexico needs a president who will be different. Different from what Calderón promised and failed to deliver.

name: Barack Obama
role: U.S. President (2009–2017) — Continued and expanded the Mérida Initiative with Calderón
quote: The United States shares responsibility for the violence in Mexico. We are part of the problem and part of the solution.

name: Hillary Clinton
role: U.S. Secretary of State (2009–2013) — Oversaw Mérida Initiative implementation and declared Mexico an 'insurgency'
quote: Mexico is looking more and more like Colombia looked 20 years ago, where the narco-traffickers controlled certain parts of the country.

name: Edgar 'La Barbie' Valdez Villarreal
role: BLO commander — American-born cartel boss from Laredo, TX; captured August 2010
quote: I may have been born in Texas but Mexico is my country. The Beltrán Leyvas gave me everything.

name: Enrique Peña Nieto
role: PRI presidential candidate — Won July 2012 election, succeeding Calderón and ending PAN rule
quote: The Calderón strategy failed. We need a new approach that puts crime reduction, not cartel leaders, at the center.

name: Marisela Morales Ibáñez
role: Attorney General of Mexico (PGR) 2011–2012 — Led major prosecutions and extraditions
quote: We will not rest until every cartel leader is behind bars, whether in Mexico or in the United States.
